title: New Nike 401k Plan Review (Youtube)
bodyHtml:
The Nike 401k plan has had a large change on Feb. 26th, 2021. The plan has now transitioned to focus on age-appropriated Target Date Funds provided by BlackRock. The following video will help you understand these changes and make the correct investment decisions for your future retirement.

The key decision is: Do you stick with the Target Funds provided by BlackRock or make your own choices with BrokerageLink?
bodyText:
